free_text: Heavy-particle stripping in the 9Be(He3,alpha)8Be
reaction and energy levels of 8Be
Thin targets were prepared by evaporating beryllium
metal from a tantalum boat onto thin Formvar backings.
Each angular distribution measurement was made in
three series of exposures covering the angular ranges
5. to 20. deg, 20. to 70. deg, and 70. to 140. deg,
respectively. In any one series of exposures the
position of the target remained fixed.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases
SD: Corrections in all Subents. BIB updated
No information about source of uncertainty
Table 1 from Phys.Rev.,131(1963)1212
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
EN-DN added.  EN -> EN-NM. EN-SEC deleted.
The error bars represent the estimated
uncertainty in the yield. The uncertainty in the
absolute cross section is not included in this estimate
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
ANG-ERR -> ANG-ERR-D. EN-SEC deleted.
ERR-ANALYS, STATUS updated.
